ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the transaction belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Remark or description of the transaction */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the transaction (e.g., cash, credit) */,
  "cash_in" TEXT /* Amount of cash inflow */,
  "cash_out" TEXT /* Amount of cash outflow */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance after the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, transfer) */,
  "transaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the transaction took place */,
  "receipt_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the transaction receipt image */,
  "is_reconciled" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the transaction has been reconciled */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the transaction */,
  "is_suspicious" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the transaction is suspicious */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the goal belongs to */,
  "target_amount" TEXT /* Target amount for the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Current progress towards the goal */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the goal */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the goal has been completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the goal was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the reminder */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of the reminder */,
  "reminder_message" TEXT /* Message for the reminder */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the reminder (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the reminder is active */,
  "last_sent_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder was last sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., expenses, savings) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL of the generated report */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the report has been shared */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report has been shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial institution */,
  "institution_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the institution's logo */,
  "account_balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the account */,
  "is_linked" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the account is linked to the application */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date the account was last synchronized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_transactions" (
  "account_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction in the account */,
  "transaction_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., large transaction, low balance) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the alert has been read */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user in response to the alert */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
